_comment: schema: { id (kebab-case), name, description, cost (valu per single bait), effect (rare_chance | catch_speed | valu_mult | xp_mult), magnitude (f32) }. Bait is consumed one per cast when equipped. Descriptions are user-editable narrative.

name: Earthworm
description: Common bait. +2% catch speed for one cast.

name: Minnow
description: Small live bait. +5% rare chance for one cast.

name: Shrimp
description: Ocean-friendly. +10% valu on the next sale.

name: Atlantean Roe
description: Forbidden roe. +50% valu on the next sale.

name: Infernal Scale
description: Black-smoking. Doubles catch speed for one cast.
